'''Rakikta''' was a [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] security controller in the city of [[Cjaalysce'I]] on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. He was known as a perfectionist and was never lax on the rules when dealing with [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]. Rakikta, whose name meant "strongarm," had six brothers, the eldest of which was [[Kuykenda]].

==Sources==
